Autumn_mass.description: Mass (in kilograms) of 20 hedgehogs sampled in autumn (before hibernation). Used to compute the mean and standard error for the autumn bar/point in the chart.

Spring_mass.description: Mass (in kilograms) of 20 hedgehogs sampled in spring (after hibernation). Used to compute the mean and standard error for the spring bar/point in the chart.

Season.description: The season (Autumn or Spring) in which the hedgehog mass measurements were collected, serving as the grouping variable on the x-axis of the chart.
